subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest in adoration round His hallowed Shrine! Render thou thanks unto God for having received so heavenly a bestowal
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف حول ضریح مطهر حمد کن خدا را که بچنین موهبت الهیه فائز شدی و بچنین
subcodes.subjects: @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @Shrines and Holy places
